layers.label: Leaf Readers
layers.purpose: single-source readers that extract headings, excerpts, and local signals

layers.label: Family Synths
layers.purpose: cluster-level agents that merge document families into stable motifs

layers.label: Chapter Weavers
layers.purpose: chapter agents that bind family outputs into the 21-station orbit

layers.label: Appendix Governors
layers.purpose: hub agents that stabilize routing law, truth corridors, replay, and deployment

layers.label: Lane Mediators
layers.purpose: pentadic-lane agents that keep formal, intuitive, compiled, verified, and editorial views synchronized

layers.label: Collective Relay
layers.purpose: multi-agent coordination interface across local, blocked-live, and future external relay channels

layers.label: Council Mesh
layers.purpose: family councils, rail councils, and sign-governors that distribute tasks, messages, and escalations

layers.label: Civilization Kernel
layers.purpose: whole-manuscript polity that compresses signs, rules, succession, and civilization-scale continuity
